overview.short: Kalijai Temple, also Kalijai Hill, is located on an island in Chilika Lake.
overview.description: Kalijai Temple, also Kalijai Hill, is located on an island in Chilika Lake. It is considered to be the abode of the Goddess Kalijai. Goddess Kalijai is actually Kali, the source and the first 'Mahavidya' of 'Dasmahavidyas'. Highly revered by the local populace, the deity has been venerated in the local folklores and legends.

topPlaces.name: Dungamal
topPlaces.description: Dungamal (Chhatragarh) is a census town in the Khordha district in the state of Odisha which is 7 km from Balugaon NAC. It is the location of an Indian Navy basic training center (INS CHILKA). It was originally a fort belonging to Khurdagarh under Banpur King Banasura.

topPlaces.name: Balugaon
topPlaces.description: Balugaon (ବାଲୁଗାଁ, English: ) is a town and a Notified Area Council in Khordha district in the state of Odisha, India. It is situated near the bank of Chilika Lake, about 90 kilometres (56 mi) from the state capital Bhubaneswar, and 76 kilometres (47 mi) from the Berhampur, Ganjam.

items.note: Dungamal (Chhatragarh) is a census town in the Khordha district in the state of Odisha which is 7 km from Balugaon NAC. It is the location of an Indian Navy basic training center (INS CHILKA). It was originally a fort belonging to Khurdagarh under Banpur King Banasura.

Balugaon (ବାଲୁଗାଁ, English: ) is a town and a Notified Area Council in Khordha district in the state of Odisha, India. It is situated near the bank of Chilika Lake, about 90 kilometres (56 mi) from the state capital Bhubaneswar, and 76 kilometres (47 mi) from the Berhampur, Ganjam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalijai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalijai is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (90 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalijai?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalijai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalijai?
faq.a: Stays in Kalijai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalijai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dungamal, Balugaon.
